title: Museums
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'museum'?

Do you think museums should be free to enter?
What is the first museum you can remember going to?
Do you prefer going to museums alone or with others?
What do you think is the best museum in the world?
What kinds of museums are there in your town?
Would a museum dedicated to your life and times be interesting?
What exhibitions are on at the moment that you'd really like to see?
Are all museums important?
Do you think museums in other countries are more or less interesting than those in your own country?
If you could have one exhibit from any museum in the world, what would it be, and why?
Would you like to work in a museum?
Would you become really intelligent if you spent a year wandering through museums?
What's the strangest museum you've heard of?
Are all museums good for children?
If you had lots of money to start your own museum, what would you exhibit in it and what would you call it?
Which country has the best museums in the world?
Do you prefer museums with interactive exhibits or those you just look at?
